system.description: The corrupted character has a beast hidden in his heart. Whenever he rolls multiple 1’s, he gains the Raging condition. While Raging, he will likely be single-minded. The Wounds from all his melee attacks increase by 2 damage and 1 severity. He has a -2d penalty to Intuition, Perception, and Insight rolls. This condition lasts until he is knocked Unconscious, dead, until it is clear all active threats have been neutralized. He can attempt to throw off his rage early with a TN 6 Intuition save.
